response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development, primarily in web and mobile technologies, but lacks direct experience in C++ development for industrial automation or cloud platform solutions. While they demonstrate strong architectural and secure engineering practices, their expertise does not align closely with the core C++ and industrial cybersecurity requirements of the role.
strengths: Strong background in software architecture and secure engineering practices
Experience with multi-threaded, high-performance systems (DLang, Node.js)
Proven ability to mentor teams and contribute to open-source projects
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ for industrial automation or on-premises solutions
No documented experience with message brokers, MQTT, or industrial protocols
No explicit experience with cloud platforms (e.g., Microsoft Azure) or IEC 62443 standards
